why the 10th, yeah, I think, like, your article is better, like, just the article is called.

default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Review 2025 performance and align on the 2026 renewal.](https://fathom.video/share/QWvnicevB9_FksUH1WX21WxDZPuZ9Mz7?tab=summary&timestamp=1224.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**2025 SEO delivered an 8x traffic increase** (150→1,200+ sessions/mo) and an 85% engagement rate, validating a strong content-audience fit.](https://fathom.video/share/QWvnicevB9_FksUH1WX21WxDZPuZ9Mz7?tab=summary&timestamp=1943.0)
  - [**The 2026 renewal will merge "PSCO" and "Editorial" into a single, flexible "Editorial Content" package** (10 pieces/mo) to simplify budgeting.](https://fathom.video/share/QWvnicevB9_FksUH1WX21WxDZPuZ9Mz7?tab=summary&timestamp=2469.0)
  - [**The "Law Practice" page review set a new content standard,** focusing on ethical phrasing (no practicing law), integration value, and a modular structure.](https://fathom.video/share/QWvnicevB9_FksUH1WX21WxDZPuZ9Mz7?tab=summary&timestamp=564.0)
  - [**A new Grasshopper partnership provides a direct channel to 150k small businesses,** making content discovery less critical for this audience.](https://fathom.video/share/QWvnicevB9_FksUH1WX21WxDZPuZ9Mz7?tab=summary&timestamp=143.0)

## Topics

### 2025 Performance Review

  - [**Traffic Growth:** 8x increase (150 → 1,200+ sessions/mo, Feb–Nov).](https://fathom.video/share/QWvnicevB9_FksUH1WX21WxDZPuZ9Mz7?tab=summary&timestamp=1943.0)
  - [**Engagement Rate:** 85% average, with the "Virtual Receptionist" cluster hitting 89%.](https://fathom.video/share/QWvnicevB9_FksUH1WX21WxDZPuZ9Mz7?tab=summary&timestamp=1980.0)
      - [**Significance:** This high rate confirms the audience is highly receptive to SEO, and the VR cluster's performance validates the market's need for a human-AI blend.](https://fathom.video/share/QWvnicevB9_FksUH1WX21WxDZPuZ9Mz7?tab=summary&timestamp=1980.0)
  - [**LLM Visibility (Crunch data):**](https://fathom.video/share/QWvnicevB9_FksUH1WX21WxDZPuZ9Mz7?tab=summary&timestamp=2182.0)
      - [40% visibility across \~15k responses.](https://fathom.video/share/QWvnicevB9_FksUH1WX21WxDZPuZ9Mz7?tab=summary&timestamp=2182.0)
      - [96% positive sentiment.](https://fathom.video/share/QWvnicevB9_FksUH1WX21WxDZPuZ9Mz7?tab=summary&timestamp=2182.0)
      - [7% brand citation from third-party sites (e.g., Clutch).](https://fathom.video/share/QWvnicevB9_FksUH1WX21WxDZPuZ9Mz7?tab=summary&timestamp=2182.0)
  - [**2025 Output:** 360 articles across 24 clusters.](https://fathom.video/share/QWvnicevB9_FksUH1WX21WxDZPuZ9Mz7?tab=summary&timestamp=1788.0)
      - [**Plan:** Merge small clusters in 2026 for more granular performance tracking.](https://fathom.video/share/QWvnicevB9_FksUH1WX21WxDZPuZ9Mz7?tab=summary&timestamp=1907.0)

### 2026 Renewal & Feedback

  - [**Feedback:** The partnership improved significantly after Jo took over.](https://fathom.video/share/QWvnicevB9_FksUH1WX21WxDZPuZ9Mz7?tab=summary&timestamp=2362.0)
      - [**Key Improvement Area:** GrowthX's design arm needs to own the visual creation for content, as it remains an internal burden for Smith.ai.](https://fathom.video/share/QWvnicevB9_FksUH1WX21WxDZPuZ9Mz7?tab=summary&timestamp=2439.0)
  - [**Renewal Proposal:** Merge "PSCO" and "Editorial" into a single "Editorial Content" package.](https://fathom.video/share/QWvnicevB9_FksUH1WX21WxDZPuZ9Mz7?tab=summary&timestamp=2469.0)
      - [**Deliverable:** 10 pieces of content per month.](https://fathom.video/share/QWvnicevB9_FksUH1WX21WxDZPuZ9Mz7?tab=summary&timestamp=2520.0)
      - [**Format Flexibility:** Can be a blog post, hub article, landing page, or template.](https://fathom.video/share/QWvnicevB9_FksUH1WX21WxDZPuZ9Mz7?tab=summary&timestamp=2541.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Simplifies budgeting for Smith.ai and better reflects GrowthX's value.](https://fathom.video/share/QWvnicevB9_FksUH1WX21WxDZPuZ9Mz7?tab=summary&timestamp=2469.0)

### Content Strategy & Execution

  - [**"Law Practice" Page Review:**](https://fathom.video/share/QWvnicevB9_FksUH1WX21WxDZPuZ9Mz7?tab=summary&timestamp=466.0)
      - [**Ethical Phrasing:** Clarified that agents do not discuss case details (to avoid practicing law).](https://fathom.video/share/QWvnicevB9_FksUH1WX21WxDZPuZ9Mz7?tab=summary&timestamp=680.0)
      - [**Integration Value:** Emphasized seamless integration with existing legal software.](https://fathom.video/share/QWvnicevB9_FksUH1WX21WxDZPuZ9Mz7?tab=summary&timestamp=983.0)
      - [**Modular Structure:** Price details will be a separate block, not hard-coded, to simplify updates and enable A/B testing.](https://fathom.video/share/QWvnicevB9_FksUH1WX21WxDZPuZ9Mz7?tab=summary&timestamp=1101.0)
      - [**FAQ Correction:** Removed a false claim about accessing client records.](https://fathom.video/share/QWvnicevB9_FksUH1WX21WxDZPuZ9Mz7?tab=summary&timestamp=1433.0)
  - [**Grasshopper Partnership:**](https://fathom.video/share/QWvnicevB9_FksUH1WX21WxDZPuZ9Mz7?tab=summary&timestamp=143.0)
      - [**Scope:** Smith.ai is the preferred receptionist vendor for Grasshopper's 150k small business clients.](https://fathom.video/share/QWvnicevB9_FksUH1WX21WxDZPuZ9Mz7?tab=summary&timestamp=143.0)
      - [**Rollout:** Pilot (Jan) → 50% of base (Feb) → full base.](https://fathom.video/share/QWvnicevB9_FksUH1WX21WxDZPuZ9Mz7?tab=summary&timestamp=143.0)
      - [**Content Impact:** Discovery will be via Grasshopper, reducing the need for Smith.ai to invest in content for this audience.](https://fathom.video/share/QWvnicevB9_FksUH1WX21WxDZPuZ9Mz7?tab=summary&timestamp=404.0)
  - [**Backlink Initiative:**](https://fathom.video/share/QWvnicevB9_FksUH1WX21WxDZPuZ9Mz7?tab=summary&timestamp=198.0)
      - [**Hiring:** Kinga hired to manage backlinks.](https://fathom.video/share/QWvnicevB9_FksUH1WX21WxDZPuZ9Mz7?tab=summary&timestamp=198.0)
      - [**Goal:** 10 links/month at $200/link ($2k/mo).](https://fathom.video/share/QWvnicevB9_FksUH1WX21WxDZPuZ9Mz7?tab=summary&timestamp=198.0)
      - [**Rationale:** A small, strategic investment compared to the $300k ad budget.](https://fathom.video/share/QWvnicevB9_FksUH1WX21WxDZPuZ9Mz7?tab=summary&timestamp=198.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**GrowthX:**](https://fathom.video/share/QWvnicevB9_FksUH1WX21WxDZPuZ9Mz7?tab=summary&timestamp=1702.0)
      - [Implement "Law Practice" page feedback and stage for Maddy's review before publishing.](https://fathom.video/share/QWvnicevB9_FksUH1WX21WxDZPuZ9Mz7?tab=summary&timestamp=1702.0)
      - [Use the "Law Practice" page as a template for other industry pages.](https://fathom.video/share/QWvnicevB9_FksUH1WX21WxDZPuZ9Mz7?tab=summary&timestamp=1718.0)
      - [Send the detailed 2026 renewal proposal to Maddy.](https://fathom.video/share/QWvnicevB9_FksUH1WX21WxDZPuZ9Mz7?tab=summary&timestamp=2656.0)
  - [**Maddy:**](https://fathom.video/share/QWvnicevB9_FksUH1WX21WxDZPuZ9Mz7?tab=summary&timestamp=1702.0)
      - [Review the staged "Law Practice" page with the internal team.](https://fathom.video/share/QWvnicevB9_FksUH1WX21WxDZPuZ9Mz7?tab=summary&timestamp=1702.0)
      - [Review the 2026 renewal proposal.](https://fathom.video/share/QWvnicevB9_FksUH1WX21WxDZPuZ9Mz7?tab=summary&timestamp=2656.0)

action_items.description: Update Low Practice page: apply Maddy edits; remove pricing; link pricing; add conflict-check FAQ; stage for Maddy review
Email Maddy: 2026 renewal proposal (10 editorial units, examples, template pages, top-vs-bottom funnel)
